{
  "claims": [
    "Since 2017, rates of anxiety and depression among California's youth have increased by 70%.",
    "One-third of California adolescents experienced severe psychological distress between 2019 and 2021.",
    "Adolescent suicide rates in California have increased by 20%.",
    "It takes an average of 45 days for families to begin receiving Medi-Cal services after initiating the process.",
    "Wait times for families new to the Medi-Cal system frequently exceed three months.",
    "California will have 41 percent fewer psychiatrists by 2028 than needed.",
    "California will have 11 percent fewer licensed marriage and family therapists, licensed professional clinical counselors, and licensed clinical social workers than needed by 2028.",
    "33 of 40 rural counties in California were designated as having mental health professional shortages in 2021.",
    "The shortages of mental health professionals decrease the quality of care and force existing staff to take longer shifts.",
